title: Sous-vide Earthy Korean Beef Stir-fry
description: This kid-friendly Croatian dish features tender beef cooked sous-vide with a silky, earthy sauce that's low-fat friendly.

ingredients.name: sous-vide vacuum-sealed beef tenderloin
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's cooked to an internal temperature of at least 63°C (145°F) for food safety.

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 63°C (145°F). Cook the beef tenderloin for 1 hour.
While the meat cooks, mix together soy sauce, brown sugar, vinegar, ginger paste, and chili garlic paste in a small bowl. Set aside.
Remove the cooked beef from the sous-vide bag and let it rest on a wire rack to cool slightly.
Cut the cooled beef into thin strips or serve as is for easier handling.
In a pan over medium heat, add a bit of oil if needed, then stir-fry the green onions until fragrant. Add the sliced beef and cook until heated through.
Pour the marinade mixture over the beef in the pan and toss to coat evenly. Cook for an additional minute or so to meld flavors.
Serve hot with chopped fresh cilantro on top.
